name: Calcolatore Rapporto Debito
desc: Calcola Debt ratio = Total debt / Net equity. Esempio: Debt €40,000, Equity €160,000 = Ratio = 0.25 (25%). Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
description: Calcola Debt ratio = Total debt / Net equity. Esempio: Debt €40,000, Equity €160,000 = Ratio = 0.25 (25%). Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
seo_description: Calcola Debt ratio = Total debt / Net equity. Esempio: Debt €40,000, Equity €160,000 = Ratio = 0.25 (25%). Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
example_label: Calculating debt-to-income ratio with €1,250 monthly debt payments and €4,200 monthly income.
result_context: Your ratio of {ratio}% indicates {evaluacion} debt levels. Lenders typically prefer ratios below 36%.
mistakes: Not including all debt obligations (credit cards, loans, alimony)
Using gross income instead of net for personal budgeting
Ignoring that different debts have different interest costs
